title: Cherries from Cherry Leaves
description: Cherry leaves can drop a new food: Cherries!
body:
**Cherries!**

This simple datapack just adds a new cute food which has a chance to drop from Cherry Leaves. This lightweight datapack is just meant to add a fun new feature in the form of cherries!

If you have any questions/bug reports, or even datapack suggestions, feel free to join my discord! https://discord.gg/NDpRZaJNn9
